what_it_does: Defines a 24x24 SVG tag icon using a stroked tag outline and a circular hole marker.
observations: Root svg uses viewBox "0 0 24 24" with width and height set to 24.
Icon uses fill="none" and stroke="currentColor" with stroke width 1.5.
Stroke caps and joins are rounded.
A path draws the tag outline from coordinates around the 24x24 grid.
A circle at cx="8", cy="8", r="1.5" represents the tag hole.
standouts: Uses currentColor so the icon inherits text or parent color.
The entire icon is made from one path and one circle.
conventions: Follows common outline-icon conventions: 24x24 grid, no fill, currentColor stroke, rounded caps and joins.
Uses inline SVG primitives without embedded styles or classes.
concerns: No title, role, or aria metadata is included in the SVG itself.
notes: A compact stroke-based SVG asset for rendering a tag icon.
questions: Should accessibility labeling be supplied by the consuming component or embedded in the SVG?
purpose_vs_actual: The filename indicates a tag icon, and the SVG renders a tag-shaped icon.
intention_signals: It appears intended to provide a reusable tag icon that can adapt to surrounding color through currentColor.
contribution: Contributes a compact, themeable tag symbol defined as simple SVG geometry for use in icon sets or UI controls.
summary_for_embedding: This is a 24x24 currentColor outline SVG depicting a tag with a circular hole marker.
intention_for_embedding: It was made to serve as a reusable themeable tag icon asset.
